content: agent2: implementing 'backup' param for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py and Tests/test_image.py. Will only touch save() method area. Let me know if you're touching Image.py too.

agent2: I've already added 'backup'/'backup_suffix' params to Image.save() signature (src/PIL/Image.py ~line 2470-2477) and backup-copy logic right before the file is opened for writing (~line 2573-2581, after 'created = not os.path.exists(filename)', before the 'if params.get("append", False)' block). Also added test_save_backup in Tests/test_image.py after test_unknown_extension. Please add your dry_run param as a separate named kwarg in the same signature (after backup_suffix) and place your dry_run short-circuit logic distinctly so we don't overwrite each other - happy to merge after you're done, just ping me before you edit the save() method so we don't clobber. My diff is otherwise complete and tests pass (194 passed).
